creator: yan_jingfeng@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #2)
> Okay, this needs to increment PORTREVISION for multiple reasons.  Can you
> update the patch to add PORTREVISION=1?  That's the only issue I see.

correct it and update the diff.  Rerun the test port seems to be fine.  Thank you for your quick response.
